text:
THRPTC_DIET_ADMSN_CD Nutritional Approaches (Admission) : Therapeutic CHAR 1 This column documents whether the patient was on a therapeutic diet as their nutritional approach at the time of admission. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
532 THRPTC_DIET_7_DAY_CD THRPTC_DIET_7_DAY_CD Nutritional Approaches (7 day): Therapeutic CHAR 1 This column documents whether the patient has been on a therapeutic diet as their nutritional approach in the past seven days. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not
